title: Veteran/Military Health Insurance - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Veteran/Military Health Insurance 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON DEPARTMENT OF VETERANS' AFFAIRS STATEWIDE VETERAN SERVICES PORTLAND BENEFITS ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides application assistance for VA benefits, such as disability compensation, pension, education, insurance, home loans, direct deposit information, burials, and vocational rehabilitation. Loan guarantee program serves Oregon and Southwest Washington. County Veterans Service Offices (CVSOs) offer a variety of services to veterans, as well as their dependents and survivors, including veterans' benefits counseling and claims preparation to obtain education, service-connected and non-service-related disability and survivor benefits for Oregon veterans, their dependents and survivors, veterans home loans, and Oregon Veterans' Home Conservatorship services, including total estate management for certain veterans, their dependents, and survivors who are legally determined to be "protected persons" under Oregon law. 100 SW Main Street Floor 2 Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Veterans, dependents/beneficiaries, and survivors Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm (800) 698-2411 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON DEPARTMENT OF VETERANS' AFFAIRS STATEWIDE VETERAN SERVICES SALEM BENEFITS ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides application assistance for VA benefits, such as disability compensation, pension, education, insurance, home loans, direct deposit information, burials, and vocational rehabilitation. Loan guarantee program serves Oregon and Southwest Washington. County Veterans Service Offices (CVSOs) offer a variety of services to veterans, as well as their dependents and survivors, including veterans' benefits counseling and claims preparation to obtain education, service-connected and non-service-related disability and survivor benefits for Oregon veterans, their dependents and survivors, veterans home loans, and Oregon Veterans' Home Conservatorship services, including total estate management for certain veterans, their dependents, and survivors who are legally determined to be "protected persons" under Oregon law. 700 Summer Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Veterans, dependents/beneficiaries, and survivors Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (800) 692-9666 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON DEPARTMENT OF VETERANS' AFFAIRS BENEFITS ASSISTANCE OREGON DEPARTMENT OF VETERANS' AFFAIRS BENEFITS ASSISTANCE
